The '''''Aramadia''-class thrustships''', also called '''T-types''' or '''Fat Men''' by the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]], were the main combat vessels of the [[Yevetha]]n space forces.

==Characteristics==
The ''Aramadia'' class was a spheroid 240 meters in diameter with six [[Aradian pulse-lifter]]s arrayed in an inverted triangle at its stern. It was from these pulse lifters that the ship earned its designation as a "thrustship."

[[File:AramadiaFront-CTD.png|thumb|left|180px|Thrustships in battle formation]]

The ship was armed with eight [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries mounted on an internal shift-track spaced around the ship. Advanced targeting systems allowed for up to four batteries to link their fire and concentrate it on a single target. Despite the punch the link batteries could provide, its major combat payload lay in its projectile-launching capability. It carried three [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers, a centrally mounted [[gravity bomb]] launcher with four bombs per load, and four ten-tube missile batteries. Overall, the weapon systems earned it a grade of medium cruiser.

The ''Aramadia'' class also benefited from superior [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]]. The ship's spherical shape enhanced the shield generators' ability to provide smooth coverage, allowing for maximum shielding with minimal power.

These ships carried 40 Yevethan [[D-type fighter]]s.

==History==
The thrustship designs were developed by the [[Yevetha]] of the planet [[N'zoth]]. Their early designs consisted of sub-light vessels, which they used to form the [[Duskhan League]], consisting of twelve colonies before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] enslaved the race. After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Yevetha rose against the Imperials and captured the entirety of the [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]]. Using the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] designs, they supplemented the [[Black Fleet]] with their own thrustships, which they built hundreds of in order to eradicate the alien inhabitants of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]].

As the technical skill of the species advanced, the Duskhan League modified its thrustships, providing them with the means for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel. One such thrustship, known as the [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|''Aramadia'']], was [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] [[Nil Spaar]]'s personal transport during a diplomatic meeting with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The negotiations were, however, only a ploy for Spaar to determine the strength of his foes and orchestrate a political incident in order to turn the political system of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] against [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. This included the ''Aramadia'' blasting off from Coruscant in order to give the appearance of escaping from the tyranny of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia.

Hundreds of thrustships were later used by the Yevetha during their secretive [[Yevethan Purge|Great Purge]] of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. Such ships exterminated alien populations and colonized their worlds with Yevethan settlers. After the capture of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Nil Spaar attempted to persuade the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] to convince Leia Organa Solo of the futility of further conflict by showing hundreds of thrustships under construction on N'zoth by the [[Nazfar Metalworks Guild]]. He further stated that further such vessels were constructed on the other worlds in the [[Duskhan League|Yevethan Protectorate]] and that the Yevetha would not relent in their actions, but this failed to dissuade General Solo. Later, as conflict began to grow between the Duskhan League and the New Republic, the thrustships were used as a primary warship during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] until the Yevetha's defeat at the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

After their defeat, the Yevetha began their attempts at rebuilding their fleet which included countless new thrustships in their forces. However, during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were alerted to the threat of the Yevetha by the [[Fian/Legends|Fia]] from [[Galantos]]. This led to the brutal invaders attacking and eliminating the Yevetha forces, annihilating the species and leaving countless hulks of burning thrustships in orbit around N'zoth.
